summary:
2025 PROPHECIES AND DIVINE MANIFESTATIONS: Brandon recounts a message from God indicating that 2025 will be an exceptionally positive year for believers, marked by divine healings and manifestations. He states that a major harvest of souls is approaching and that the return of Jesus is imminent. Brandon emphasizes the need for believers to stretch their faith and anticipate unprecedented interventions, noting that God intends to perform extraordinary acts for those who believe for bigger outcomes.

ATTAINING INTIMACY WITH THE DIVINE: Brandon explains that establishing a close relationship with God requires daily commitment, specifically through memorizing scripture and dedicating time to prayer. Drawing on advice from figures associated with Rhema Ministry and other religious leaders, he recommends praying in the spirit or speaking in tongues for thirty minutes to an hour daily. Brandon asserts that internalizing the Bible is essential for spiritual growth, protecting oneself from demonic influences, and ensuring that prayers are answered effectively. He reiterates that spiritual transformation happens gradually by continuously feeding the spirit with the Word of God.

DELIVERANCE AND PHYSICAL HEALING: Brandon declares supernatural healing and freedom over his listeners, specifically targeting various physical and mental afflictions. He proclaims deliverance from addictions to pornography, alcohol, and drugs, as well as mental health struggles including PTSD, anorexia, bulimia, Alzheimer's, and dementia. Additionally, Brandon decrees the restoration of physical health, specifically mentioning the reversal of vision issues such as cataracts and glaucoma, the preservation of hearing, and the renewal of internal organs.

ECONOMIC AND POLITICAL DECLARATIONS: Brandon shifts his focus to national and global matters, making declarations concerning political and financial figures. He calls for Donald Trump to be guided by the Holy Spirit with a godly cabinet and declares that Elon Musk will experience a radical religious conversion. Addressing the economy, Brandon predicts that the stock market and cryptocurrency will surge in 2025, delaying any major economic downturn. He specifically prays against financial sabotage, mentioning BlackRock, Jerome Powell, and the Federal Reserve, while asserting spiritual authority over the nation's economic stability.

GLOBAL REVIVAL IMPLICATIONS: Brandon anticipates a significant spiritual awakening taking place internationally. He predicts a major revival sweeping across Asia, with a distinct emphasis on South Korea experiencing a profound spiritual movement. He also recommends reading the book The Ultimate Voice by Oral Roberts for further spiritual instruction.
rawData: [December 19, 2024]-[Intimacy with the Lord - a call to prayer – day 60]-[https://youtu.be/iehkue2MLfQ]-[Good morning family, praise the Lord! How are you all doing today? Well, thank you for joining me. You know, I was praying this evening and the Lord spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, 2025 is going to be a good year for the believers.' I was looking over in the spirit and the Lord was allowing me to see the outpouring of healings, the demonstrations, and the manifestations of the Father. You all, we're about to see some of the most amazing things. I'm telling you, our forefathers—like even 200 or 300 years ago—the people who were looking forward to the Lord Jesus coming and thought he was coming in their timeframe, folks, we're about to see the Lord Jesus come. We're going to see a major harvest of souls. I know I keep telling you all this, and I've said it over and over; I probably sound like a broken record, but I need you to know it. I need you to have a deep revelation that God is about to do something, because he keeps telling me, 'Brandon, I'm about to show up and show off in your life. I want you to believe me for bigger.' This is the second time this week he said that. We are on the countdown: 5, 4, 3, 2, 1, liftoff! I'm telling you, a great move of God is about to hit this land like you have never seen. I'm telling you: exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. It's time to believe God for bigger. Stretch your faith to believe exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. He said, 'Brandon, it's going to be about the thinking.' I said this yesterday, but it just keeps bubbling inside of me, just believing. I went to a Christmas party today and it was all I could do. I was sitting at the front, and it's probably because it's a prayer church—you know, our church has a lot of intercessory prayer that goes forth out of there—but I was sitting toward the front where they had the dinner, and I felt like travail was hitting me in the middle of the Christmas party. People were playing games and everything, and I'm looking, going, 'My goodness, I just feel like I could weep because of the intercession coming up out of my spirit to intercede for the lost and for what's coming.' When I came home, I started watching Billy Burke. I told my wife, 'I want to hear this sermon from Billy Burke,' because it was a healing thing. He was teaching healing and he just fans my flame. The words he speaks inspire me, and I just want to stay inspired. People were asking in the comment section—my son told me and my wife told me from the emails—people are saying, 'How, Brandon, do we have an intimate relationship with the Father? How do we get there?' When Diana shared the word she had from the Lord, it challenged a lot of you, and rightfully so. It challenged me and it challenged her. It wasn't just that he was speaking it to us and we let it fall on deaf ears. He was talking to us too, because we need to come up higher. Diana and I have talked about that word a lot lately. Going to a place of intimacy with the Father is not a hard thing. We make it hard because we think God is way out there. Of course, God is a holy God, a big God, the ultimate in everything, but he's small enough to live in each one of us. It's like the Imperials sang: 'My God is a big God who walks among the mountains, but he's small enough to live in me.' God is small enough to live in you. He lives on the inside of us, and we make it difficult whenever we have all these religious thoughts like Pharisees. We think God doesn't want to spend time with us. We have all these stupid thoughts because the devil tries to put those negative words in; he comes like a roaring lion seeking whom he may devour. He's looking for those he can pick off—the ones who are lukewarm, cold, or not hot. Like Billy Burke said tonight when I was watching him, there's a river of water that flows out of us. Have you ever seen a fire hose when the fire department is putting out a big fire? A major fire hose will knock you down. The devil is looking to see if there is a major fire hose, a major river flowing out of you. When you are standing there, he's looking to see if you have it or not, because any Christian who is on fire, he's going to run away from. James says that if we submit ourselves unto God and resist the devil, he will flee in terror. So he's looking for who has that fire, who has that inward knowing of who they are in Christ—that you can do all things through Christ who strengthens you. He's out there, his eyes roaming to and fro, and he's going, 'I want to see who I can devour.' But he can't devour the one whose foundation and house is built on the solid rock. He knows whom he can devour and whom he can't; that's why he's seeking, because there are some folks he knows he can't mess with. Those are the ones who are on fire for Jesus. So how do you get on fire for Jesus? He made it so a child can have a relationship with him. He made it so every born-again Christian has the ability. We all have 24 hours in a day, seven days a week. Not one of us has any more and not one has anything less, but everyone has a choice of how much time they're going to spend with him today. You may say, 'Well, I'm so busy. I've got to go to the gym, I've got to go to work, I've got to come home and watch my favorite TV program.' Then you have some people who go to the gym and look like Arnold Schwarzenegger, or any athlete, but everyone has a choice of how they want to spend their time. If you want to be a spiritual giant, you have to do what a spiritual giant does. You've got to get in the word. Everybody has the opportunity to get in the word. You can get your Bible out, look at those scriptures, read a couple of passages, and memorize them. It's not going to be a microwave; it's going to be a slow-cook oven. Find one or two scriptures and memorize them over the week. If you memorize ten scriptures over the year, think about the math on that. If you get those down inside of your heart within a two-year period, think about where you'll be. Praying in the spirit: I had a counselor when I worked for Rhema Ministry. She said if you pray in the spirit and talk in tongues for 30 minutes a day, your life will never be the same. Then increase it to an hour. Brother Kenneth Hagin talked about praying for an hour or two in tongues, in the mornings and the evenings. That's why I've tried to tell you all: if your flesh eats breakfast, lunch, and dinner, try to feed your spirit breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Feeding your spirit three times a day with small passages doesn't have to be reading the whole Bible. People get on these religious kicks and say, 'I'm going to read the Bible in a year.' Fine, but did you learn anything? Did the word change you, or did you just do it to brag about it? Find scriptures that will change you. The Bible says, 'If ye abide in me and my words remain in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done.' If you're getting that word down inside of you and feeding on it, that's when your prayers get answered. If you're not getting your prayers answered, maybe it's because you don't have enough word inside of you. The more word you put on the inside, the more you're going to see things change, because that's when your prayers are going to get answered. Prayer changes things, but it's the scripture you know that's going to change you. People say, 'I've got a devil,' and 'I don't know how to get free.' The Bible says you will know the truth and the truth will set you free. The more you get inside the word of God, the more it's going to change you from glory to glory. How do you become intimate with the Lord? You get intimate with the word. When you get the word inside of you, your prayer life is going to change. Faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. Your faith is going to grow, you're going to be intimate with the Father, and it's going to change your life. The Bible says that his sheep will hear his voice and a stranger's voice they will not follow. But you don't know that until you get inside that word. Have a revelation of that. The entrance of his word brings forth light, because God is light and in him there is no darkness at all. The more you get light—which is the word of God—the more you are intimate with the word by reading it. You say it's boring? No, it will change you. It is life to those that find it and health to all their flesh. Seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened unto you. His words are life and health to your flesh. If you are bound by a demonic force, the Bible says if you don't fill your temple up, the devil you cast out comes back for a season to see if you're filled. If not, he comes back with eight more of his buddies and you're worse off. The word is what keeps you free and makes you free. You have to have a foundation of the word of God in your life to change you. People say, 'How do I have an intimate relationship with the Father?' It's by feeding on the word of God and praying. If your word level is low, keep your word level high. The more you meditate on that word, it will change you from the inside out. You're going to hear his voice, you're going to know him, and you're going to become intimate with him. Then you pray and you obey, and the Lord will speak to you. The more you pray in tongues—if you need to get baptized in the Holy Ghost, just pray in English until you do. The more you hang around me, you're going to get baptized in the Holy Ghost because I believe in it: the Holy Ghost and fire. The burden-removing, yoke-destroying power is on the inside of you when you get filled with the Holy Ghost. I practice it too much. The Holy Spirit dwells inside of me richly by faith. Out of my belly shall flow rivers of living water, and that's what quenches all the fiery darts of the wicked. The name of the Lord is a strong tower, and the righteous run into it and they are safe. I want to encourage you today to make the word of God a priority. Find scriptures that minister to you. Find a version of the Bible you understand, like the Amplified or the New Living Translation, so it becomes life to you. That's how you get intimate with the Father. The more you read, pray, and obey, the closer you become. Miss Sue used to tell me that if you just pray 30 minutes a day in tongues—start with 10 or 15 minutes, then work up to 30—praying in the spirit with a brand new tongue, it's a beautiful song. That's what's going to change you. You'll start to hear the voice of the Lord, and he'll start giving you signs, wonders, dreams, and visions. At the end of 2025, your life will have radically changed. Try it for a year. Find scriptures for healing, deliverance, your marriage—whatever you are believing for—and use them as a sword against the devil. God said to me, 'Brandon, I'm ready to do some big stuff for my kids if they'll just believe me.' This will be an amazing year for you and your children: spiritually, physically, financially, mentally, and emotionally. 2025: believe God for big. We're almost done with 2024, but believe him even more in 2025. I'm not worried about what's going on in the world right now—the wars and rumors of wars. I'm focused on you today. What are you believing God for in 2025? I'm going to keep on this for a bit: believing God for the supernatural, exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. Let's pray. I hope this blessed you. Let's believe God for something big for you. Don't keep putting off for tomorrow what you believe for now. Now faith is the substance of things hoped for and the evidence of things not seen. He corrects me all the time: 'Brandon, why are you believing for tomorrow?' I'll be in the church praying and think, 'Maybe that'll come in a couple days.' He'll say, 'Brandon, hold on, believe for now.' Now faith is the substance of things hoped for and the evidence of things not seen yet. We stagger not at the promise of God through unbelief, but are strong in faith, giving glory to God. Be fully persuaded that what God has promised, he is able also to perform. Father, I thank you for the supernatural. Everything the Bible says I can have, I will have. Everything the Bible says I can do, I will do, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I believe today that they are delivered and set free. I thank you, Lord, that they will know the truth and the truth will make them free. I speak life, increase, and favor over their lives. Everything they put their hands to will prosper. This is a time like never before where you said, 'Brandon, I want to show up and show off in their lives.' I believe it is a time for healing and wholeness over marriages. We call your marriage blessed and favored. I thank you, Lord, for deliverance from pornography. You foul devil from hell, get off of them! We say they are delivered from the spirit of lust and pornography in the name of Jesus. Delivered from alcoholism, tobacco, and drug addiction; from abuse, anorexia, and bulimia, I say in the name of Jesus they are free. I thank you, Lord, that they are delivered from PTSD and strongholds of the mind. From Alzheimer's and dementia, they will have sound sleep and wake up refreshed. Their youth is renewed like the eagles'. Their eyes will not grow dim; there are no cataracts, no glaucoma. We decree 20/20 vision in the name of Jesus. We thank you that the fire of the Holy Ghost delivers them from satanic bondage. We call their ears to pop open. Even as they grow older, they will not lose their hearing. I thank you that glory is restoring their organs. I thank you for the blessing of the Lord, that the harvesters and the sowers are going hand in hand. Seed time and harvest time is being shortened now. Acceleration is coming to your seeds. Every seed they sow, come forth in the name of Jesus. Abundance is on your life today. They are no longer broke, busted, and disgusted, but have overflow. Father, we call Trump to be filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost, with a godly cabinet. I thank you for our economy and everything you showed me about BlackRock and Jerome Powell, and the interest rates, and what you warned me about them trying to sink the economy. Satan, get your hands off of our economy! We have authority over you. Crypto will soar. The things God has for his body will soar in 2025. We thank you for supernatural abundance. The stock market and cryptocurrency are turning around. We will not have a major economic downturn right now; it is delayed. Father, I thank you that Elon Musk is born again and radically saved. I call forth regulation over crypto and I thank you, Lord, that Jerome Powell and the Fed will not mess this up anymore. The devil is trying to rear his head, but we still have work to do. We call for blessing over this nation and favor. Tomorrow is going to be a good day. We call our unsaved loved ones saved and filled with the Holy Ghost. If you want to know how to draw close to God, read 'The Ultimate Voice' by Oral Roberts; that book is amazing. Thank you for joining us. Our South Korean channel is exploding, and we have a China channel now. If you are new here and speak Chinese or Korean, go join those channels so you don't have to read the subtitles. We appreciate the support on this channel. Please click the subscribe button, the notification button, and comment below. It helps us get in the algorithm and spread the gospel throughout the whole world. Asia is about to have a major revival, especially South Korea. God bless you all, and we'll see you again tomorrow. Remember to put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you, and we love you. Look up, for your redemption draws nigh. Bye-bye.]
